message:
fix: resolve issues #7404-#7426 (alerts, clipboard, navbar, meta, mocks) (#7428)

* fix: guard localStorage in alerts, restore meta on unmount, uniform navbar buttons, cross-platform install commands

- #7404: Replace raw localStorage calls in AlertsContext with safeLocalStorage
  wrappers to prevent crashes in SSR/non-browser environments
- #7405: Add min-h-[44px] to AI Missions navbar button for uniform sizing
- #7423: Restore previous meta description on Welcome page unmount to prevent
  SPA route leaking
- #7424: Replace macOS-only `open` command with cross-platform comment in
  FromLens and FromHeadlamp install steps

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: validate clipboard success, filter comment lines from analytics, cap share registries, reset scenario handlers

- #7425: Check copyToClipboard return value before showing success state
  and firing analytics events across all install pages
- #7426: Use first non-comment command for analytics instead of commands[0]
  which could be a comment line
- #7418: Add MAX_SHARE_REGISTRY_ENTRIES cap to in-memory share registries
  to prevent unbounded memory growth in long sessions
- #7420: Reset MSW handlers before applying new scenario to prevent stale
  overrides from shadowing newer expectations

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -115,7 +115,7 @@ const CLUSTER_PORTFORWARD_STEPS: InstallStep[] = [
     title: 'Port-forward and open',
     commands: [
       'kubectl port-forward svc/kc-kubestellar-console 8080:8080',
-      'open http://localhost:8080',
+      '# Then open http://localhost:8080 in your browser',
     ],
     description: 'Access the console locally. Great for evaluation or single-user access.' },
 ]
@@ -219,14 +219,16 @@ function DeploymentSection() {
   }
 
   const copyCommands = async (commands: string[], step: number) => {
-    const text = commands.join('\n')
-    await copyToClipboard(text)
+    const text = commands.filter(c => !c.startsWith('#') && c !== '').join('\n')
+    const ok = await copyToClipboard(text)
+    if (!ok) return
     const key = `${activeTab}-${step}`
     setCopiedStep(key)
     clearTimeout(copiedTimerRef.current)
     copiedTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() => setCopiedStep(null), COPY_FEEDBACK_MS)
-    emitFromHeadlampCommandCopy(activeTab, step, commands[0])
-    emitInstallCommandCopied('from_headlamp', commands[0])
+    const firstCommand = commands.find(c => !c.startsWith('#') && c !== '') ?? commands[0]
+    emitFromHeadlampCommandCopy(activeTab, step, firstCommand)
+    emitInstallCommandCopied('from_headlamp', firstCommand)
   }
 
   const steps = activeTab === 'localhost'
